explanations.1: This comment tells a documentation tool to highlight the next line when displaying code.
explanations.2: This sets a prefix used to name Docker containers, keeping them organized when multiple projects run together.
explanations.13: This specifies both the Joomla version and the base Docker image it needs (Apache is the web server).
explanations.15: This changes MySQL's network port from the default 3306 to 3303, so it doesn't conflict with other databases on your machine.
explanations.21: This sets the port where you'll access the Joomla website from your browser (localhost:8083).
